verification.target_vocab_notes: コーヒー appears as the main subject modified by まろやかな
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - これはとてもまろやかなこーひーだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: これは, とても adverb, な-adjective まろやかな, だ copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses な-adjective and adverb, but まろやかな (mild/mellow) is somewhat advanced vocabulary
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically solid N5. Vocabulary まろやか is a bit advanced but acceptable.

verification.target_vocab_notes: コーヒー appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このこーひーはぬるいです
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, は topic, い-adjective ぬるい, です copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple sentence with demonstrative and adjective. ぬるい (lukewarm) is standard N5 vocabulary
verification.overall_notes: Clear N5 sentence with appropriate structure.

verification.target_vocab_notes: コーヒー appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - こーひーはうすいのがすきです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (薄いの), which is N4 complexity
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with nominalized clause structure
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 の nominalizer creating embedded clause (薄いのが好き).

verification.target_vocab_notes: 漢字 appears as object of 読める
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - くんはこのかんじがよめますか
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential form 読める (can read), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for potential form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 potential form よめます.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 漢字 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かんじはよむのがむずかしい
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (読むのが), which is N4 complexity
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex nominalized clause structure
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 の nominalizer creating embedded clause.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 漢字 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このかんじはどういういみですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, は topic, どういう question phrase, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses どういう (what kind of) question pattern with です/か
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 question pattern with どういう.

verification.target_vocab_notes: その appears as demonstrative modifying そば (vicinity)
verification.kana_notes: Major error: kana shows きた (came/wore) but Japanese has 着た (wore). Should be すうっときた but the verb is 着る (to wear), not 来る (to come). The reading should use き not き
verification.grammar_notes: Uses ている-style form but with ta-form. The structure その+noun is basic N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with adverb すうっと and descriptive elements
verification.overall_notes: Major kana error - 着た should be きた not きた. Also sentence complexity is high.

verification.target_vocab_notes: その appears as demonstrative modifying 仕事
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - そのしごとでへとへとだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: その demonstrative, で particle (cause/reason), へとへと (exhausted), だ copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple structure but へとへと is somewhat advanced vocabulary (exhausted)
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example. へとへと is onomatopoeia but acceptable.

verification.target_vocab_notes: その appears as demonstrative modifying ニュース
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - そのにゅーすはらじおできいたよ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: その demonstrative, は topic, で location/means, た past, よ sentence-ending particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward past tense with location/means particle
verification.overall_notes: Clear N5 sentence with good demonstrative usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 子供 appears with counter
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あなたにはなんにんこどもがいますか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: には particle combination, question word 何人, が subject, います existence, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: standard family question with counter
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 family question pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 子供 appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはからだのよわいこどもだった
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, possessive の, い-adjective 弱い modifying child, だった past copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: multiple elements including possessive, adjective modifier, past copula
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with modifying adjective and past tense.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 子供 appears as subject with も particle
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - やさいのきらいなこどももいる
verification.grammar_notes: N5: possessive の, な-adjective 嫌いな modifying child, も (also/too), いる existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: modifying clause with な-adjective, も particle for 'some/also'
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with な-adjective modification pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こどもたち appears in plural form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはこどもたちとあそぶのがひじょうにすきだ
verification.grammar_notes: Contains の nominalizer creating embedded clause (遊ぶのが), which is N4 complexity
verification.difficulty_notes: Too complex with nominalized clause structure
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 の nominalizer creating embedded clause.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょっと appears as adverb modifying 低い
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このつくえはわたしにはちょっとひくい
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, は topic, には particle combination, adverb ちょっと, い-adjective 低い
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses には and adverb with adjective
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example of adverb usage.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょっと used as interjection/attention-getter
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ちょっと、そこのきみ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: interjection ちょっと, demonstrative そこ, possessive の, 君
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple interjection usage
verification.overall_notes: Simple N5 interjection pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ちょっと appears as adverb/polite softener
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ちょっとおたのみがあるんですが
verification.grammar_notes: Contains んです explanatory pattern (N4 grammar) and が trailing particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 んです
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 んです pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女の子達 appears in plural form as subject
verification.kana_notes: Major error: kana shows とおる but Japanese has 達 which should be たち, not とおる. Should be おんなのこたち
verification.grammar_notes: N5: その demonstrative, は topic, とても adverb, い-adjective 忙しい
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5 if kana were correct
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to major kana error: 達 is たち, not とおる.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女の子 appears in から clause
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あなたがおんなのこだからよ
verification.grammar_notes: Contains から (because), which when used for explanation/reason is borderline N4. Combined with sentence-ending よ makes it N4 level
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for から reason clause
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 から causal/reason pattern (だから construction is N4).

verification.target_vocab_notes: 女の子 appears in relative clause modifying subject
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ぼくといっしょにえいがにいったおんなのこはぼくのともだちです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains relative clause (映画に行った女の子) modifying the subject, which is N4 complexity
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex relative clause structure, too advanced
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 relative clause construction.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 紙 appears with counter 一枚
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれはいちまいのかみにてがみをかきました
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, counter 一枚, possessive の, に destination/location, を object, ました past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: counter usage, multiple particles, longer sentence
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 example with counter and multiple particles.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 紙 appears as object modified by 書く
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かくかみをいちまいください
verification.grammar_notes: N5: verb 書く modifying 紙, を object, counter 一枚, ください request
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: modifying verb, counter, polite request
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with verb modification and request form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 紙 appears as main topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かみはきからつくられる
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form 作られる (is made), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for passive form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 passive form つくられる.

verification.target_vocab_notes: かみさん (wife) appears, but target vocab is 紙 (paper). These are different words despite same kana reading
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches the Japanese text, but wrong word
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential negative 寝られない (cannot sleep), which is N4 grammar. Also contains んだ explanatory pattern (N4)
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 grammar level
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - かみさん (wife) not 紙 (paper). Also contains N4 potential form and んだ.

verification.target_vocab_notes: かみさん (wife) appears, not 紙 (paper). Wrong vocabulary match
verification.kana_notes: Kana matches but wrong word
verification.grammar_notes: N5: possessive の, 元気 adjective with implicit copula, question marker
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 if vocab were correct
verification.overall_notes: Wrong vocabulary - かみさん (wife) not 紙 (paper). False positive match.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 嫌い appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あからさまにいえばかれはきらいだ
verification.grammar_notes: Contains ば conditional form (言えば - if I say), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with conditional form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 ば conditional form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: お嫌い appears with honorific prefix
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - いびつなやさいはおきらいですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: な-adjective いびつな, は topic, honorific お, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses honorific prefix and な-adjective. いびつ (misshapen) is somewhat advanced vocab
verification.overall_notes: Acceptable N5 with honorific prefix. いびつ is advanced but sentence structure is N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 嫌い appears in が嫌い preference pattern
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはかのくちのききかたがきらいだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, possessive の chain, が object of dislike, だ copula. 口のききかた (way of talking) uses N5 structures
verification.difficulty_notes: Advanced N5: multiple possessive の, compound noun 口のききかた
verification.overall_notes: Grammatically N5 but vocabulary is advanced. Acceptable for upper N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: お先に appears in set phrase with honorific
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - おさきにどうぞ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: honorific お, に particle, どうぞ. This is a set phrase お先にどうぞ (after you)
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: set phrase, very common expression
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 courtesy expression.

verification.target_vocab_notes: お先に appears in set phrase
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - どうぞ、おさきに
verification.grammar_notes: N5: どうぞ, honorific お, に particle. Same set phrase as previous
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple set phrase
verification.overall_notes: Standard N5 courtesy expression.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 先 appears meaning 'beyond/further'
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - ここからさきにはいけません
verification.grammar_notes: N5: ここから (from here), には particle combination, いけません negative potential-like form. Actually いけません here is just negative of 行く in potential/permission sense, but the structure is N5
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses には combination and negative form for prohibition/impossibility
verification.overall_notes: Grammar appears N5, but いけません (cannot go) could be interpreted as potential negative. If it's just negative of 行く for permission/possibility, it's acceptable N5.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答える appears in past tense こたえました
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match
verification.grammar_notes: Contains passive form われました (was asked), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with quoted speech and passive form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 passive form われました.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答える appears in potential negative form 答えられなかった
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - てすとでいちもんもこたえられなかった
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential negative form 答えられなかった (could not answer), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: N4 grammar with potential form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 potential form られなかった.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 答える appears in past tense 答えた
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - なんてこたえたの
verification.grammar_notes: N5: 何て (what), た past, の question particle (casual)
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: casual question with の particle
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 casual question pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こたえる appears but with different meaning - 'to take a toll/affect' rather than 'to answer'. This is a different usage/meaning of the same verb
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれにはさむさがとてもこたえる
verification.grammar_notes: N5: には particle, が subject, adverb とても, dictionary form こたえる
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5 grammatically but semantic issue
verification.overall_notes: こたえる here means 'to take a toll/be hard on' not 'to answer'. Different meaning may confuse learners expecting 'to answer'.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食堂 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - しょくどうはどこですか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word どこ, です copula, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Beginner N5: simple location question
verification.overall_notes: Basic N5 location question.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食堂 appears as topic
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - しょくどうはもうひらいてますか
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, もう (already), ている form for state, か question
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses ている for state and もう time adverb
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with ている for state.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 食堂 appears as subject
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - しょくどうがまだひらいてるかどうか、だれかしってる
verification.grammar_notes: Contains かどうか (whether or not) which is N4 grammar for embedded questions
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with embedded question structure
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 かどうか embedded question pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: テーブル appears with location marker の上に
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かのじょはそのはこをてーぶるのうえにおいた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, を object, possessive の, location 上に, た past
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: multiple elements including location phrase
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with location phrase の上に.

verification.target_vocab_notes: テーブル appears with につく
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれらはれすとらんのてーぶるについた
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, possessive の, に particle, た past. につく (to sit at/take a seat) is N5 level
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward sentence with に particle
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 usage of につく.

verification.target_vocab_notes: テーブル appears in compound with と particle
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - かれらはいすとてーぶるをつかわない
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, と (and) particle, を object, ない negative
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: simple negative with と conjunction
verification.overall_notes: Clear N5 sentence with と conjunction.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 働く appears in て form 働いて
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - もうあさからばんまではたらいてくたくただよ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: もう, から-まで (from-to), て form connecting, adjective クタクタ, よ particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: から-まで range, て form for sequence/cause, colloquial クタクタ
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with から-まで and て form.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 働く appears as modifying verb 働く時間帯
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - まいにちはたらくじかんたいがちがうんです
verification.grammar_notes: Contains んです explanatory pattern (N4 grammar)
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be upper N5 except for N4 んです
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 んです pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: 働く appears in ている form
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - あなたはなぜはたらいているの
verification.grammar_notes: N5: は topic, question word なぜ, ている progressive, の question particle
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: question with なぜ and ている form
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 question with ている.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こんな appears as demonstrative modifying ところ
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - なんだってわたしのほんがこんなところにあるんだろう
verification.grammar_notes: Contains んだろう (explanatory + conjecture), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Complex with N4 grammar
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 んだろう pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こんなに appears as degree adverb
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - まいにちこんなにあついのですか
verification.grammar_notes: Contains のです explanatory pattern (N4 grammar)
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid N5 except for N4 のです
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 のです pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: こんな appears modifying 甘いコーヒー
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わたしはこんなあまいこーひーはのめない
verification.grammar_notes: Contains potential negative 飲めない (cannot drink), which is N4 grammar
verification.difficulty_notes: Would be mid-upper N5 except for potential form
verification.overall_notes: Must reject due to N4 potential form のめない.

verification.target_vocab_notes: たくさん appears with の as modifier
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このがっこうはたくさんのせいとがいます
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, は topic, たくさんの (many), が subject, います existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: straightforward existence sentence with quantifier
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with quantifier たくさん.

verification.target_vocab_notes: たくさん appears in idiomatic 'もうたくさん' (had enough)
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - このわるいてんきはもうたくさんだ
verification.grammar_notes: N5: この demonstrative, い-adjective 悪い, は topic, もうたくさん (had enough), だ copula
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid N5: uses idiomatic expression もうたくさん
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with idiomatic たくさん usage meaning 'enough'.

verification.target_vocab_notes: たくさん appears as predicate
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わからないことばがたくさんある
verification.grammar_notes: N5: negative verb 分からない modifying 言葉, が subject, たくさん, ある existence
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: verb modifier (分からない言葉), quantifier, existence verb
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with verb modification pattern.

verification.target_vocab_notes: ドア appears with location の前で
verification.kana_notes: Perfect match - わかいおとこのにんがどあのまえでうたっています
verification.grammar_notes: N5: adjective 若い, possessive の, location 前で, ている progressive
verification.difficulty_notes: Mid-upper N5: multiple modifiers, location phrase, ている form
verification.overall_notes: Good N5 with location phrase and ている.
